project_goal: Complete the project according to canonical plans, architecture, tests, documentation, and release gates.

tasks.title: Build the verified project-completion backlog
tasks.description: Read canonical plans, current implementation, tests, documentation, and history. Add a finite dependency-aware list of bounded remaining tasks. Do not change source code. Preserve this bootstrap task.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical project instructions and plans were read.
Remaining work is decomposed into bounded unique tasks.
Every implementation task has objective acceptance criteria.
Verification commands are added wherever technically possible.
tasks.notes: For maximum assurance, human-review the generated backlog before a long unattended run.
